source_text: Refer to F.4.3.4 a. Test panels must: - Measure one of the two options: $138 \mathrm{~mm} \times 500 \mathrm{~mm}$ OR $275 \mathrm{~mm} \times 500 \mathrm{~mm}$ - Be supported by a span distance of 400 mm - Have equal surface area for the top and bottom skin - Have bare edges, without skin material b
